svg.title: Say-do failure: a claimed outcome the evidence did not back
svg.desc: issue_refund produced no result satisfying the declared conditions. Assertion outcome-refund-tool (tool_result); no qualifying tool span in the trace. Tool and state evidence decide the outcome, never the agent's words.
svg.text: no qualifying tool span in the trace
issue_refund produced no result satisfying the declared
Tool and state evidence decide the outcome, never the agent's words.
